description:
Goal
Audit lowering and planning provenance/state duplication and delete redundant stored vectors or copies where the same information can be derived from authoritative IR or world state.

Scope
- `src/ir_lower/cps.rs` continuation provenance
- planner/lowering paths with repeated cloned demand or capability update state
- only structurally redundant duplication, not semantically necessary retention

Contract
- provenance stores only irreducible information
- data derivable from authoritative state is not duplicated
- if a copy is necessary, the reason is explicit in the data model rather than accidental

Validation
- targeted lowering/planner tests
- clippy sweep for redundant clone
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Delete redundant lowering and planning provenance copies
